title: Something I have been wondering about
display_title: Something I have been wondering about
wikitext:
[]: Something I have been wondering about             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sat Jul 09, 2005 7:47 am I am just curious, but does anyone know if Touji's sister and Hikari's sisters were ever given names? And also how old are they? For some reason I have always seen Touji's sister as being 8 and Hikari's as one be 12 and the other 16, but those numbers may just be due to reading too many Fanfics.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Sat Jul 09, 2005 8:53 am i think hikari mentions her sisters' names when she talks with touji about getting him lunch... not too sure about touji's sister though

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jul 09, 2005 9:09 am Touji's sister is never named; of Hikari's sisters, the LTP version of ep#15 states: [code:1]Hikari: It's a friend of my sister Kodama. He said: "You must introduce her to me!" Please! # Hikari's elder sister is named Kodama. # Hikari's younger sister is named Nozomi. # These are the names of Japan's bullet trains. # Kodama (Local Express), Hikari (Super Express), Nozomi (Super-Super Express)[/code:1]

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sat Jul 09, 2005 9:57 am Thank ya much

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Sat Jul 09, 2005 11:18 am Mr. Tines wrote: Touji's sister is never named; of Hikari's sisters, the LTP version of ep#15 states: [code:1]Hikari: It's a friend of my sister Kodama. He said: "You must introduce her to me!" Please! # Hikari's elder sister is named Kodama. # Hikari's younger sister is named Nozomi. # These are the names of Japan's bullet trains. # Kodama (Local Express), Hikari (Super Express), Nozomi (Super-Super Express)[/code:1]

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Sat Jul 09, 2005 12:06 pm wasnt kodama a name used in some other anime? perhaps i have read way too many fan fics

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sat Jul 09, 2005 12:39 pm Kodama is the name of those little ghost creature thingies from princess mononoke

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Sat Jul 09, 2005 2:50 pm I've heard Touji's sister refered to as Mari several times, though none of the references I could give you are canonical. So far, the worst naming I've encountered has been Anita.

[]:             Quote Post by RuaDragon » Sun Jul 10, 2005 4:23 am In episode 4 Kensuke says Toji's sister is a second grader, that would make her, what? 7? 8 maybe?

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sun Jul 10, 2005 7:14 am RuaDragon wrote: In episode 4 Kensuke says Toji's sister is a second grader, that would make her, what? 7? 8 maybe?
